bgErrorAuthInvalid.message: Authentication Error: Invalid API key. Check the extension settings.

bgErrorAuthUnauthorized.message: Authentication Error: Unauthorized access (401/403). Check your settings.

bgErrorNetwork.message: Network Error: Cannot connect to AI service.

bgErrorNoKey.message: Missing API key. Please right-click the extension icon, select 'Options' (or 'Manage Extension' -> 'Preferences') and set your API key.

bgErrorNoText.message: The page does not contain any meaningful text to summarize.

bgErrorNoValidText.message: AI did not return any valid text.

bgErrorRateLimit.message: Rate limit exceeded (429). Please try again later.

bgErrorUIShow.message: Scutter Skim: Cannot display error in UI.

bgErrorUnsupported.message: The selected AI provider is not currently supported.

bgSystemPageWarning.message: Scutter Skim: Cannot run on system pages.

extensionDescription.message: Instantly summarize the current web page using AI.

optionsApiKeyHelpOllama.message: Ollama runs locally. No API key is required. Make sure Ollama is running and accessible.

optionsApiKeyHelpText.message: Don't have an API key? You can get a free one from

optionsApiKeyHint.message: Your key is stored securely in your browser and never sent anywhere except directly to the AI provider.

optionsBaseUrlHint.message: Leave empty to use the provider's default API endpoint. Useful for custom proxies or local models.

optionsLoadModelsErrorNoKey.message: Please enter an API key to load models.

optionsModelHint.message: Select a model or load the current list via API (requires a saved valid API key).

optionsShortcutHint.message: Click the field and press a key combination (e.g., Alt+Shift+U).

optionsShortcutNotSupported.message: Shortcut update not supported in this browser.

optionsShowFabHint.message: Displays a floating button on web pages to quickly summarize them on mobile devices.

uiErrorLibraries.message: Error: Rendering libraries failed to load.
